title: phlegmariurus laxus
intro: Phlegmariurus laxus, a type of climbing fern, is a species of plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Phlegmariurus laxus include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, with the leaves and stems being the primary parts used for medicinal purposes.
